description_long: This is a grand piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a large, curved wooden body and three sturdy legs. The lid is propped open, revealing the strings and internal components, which are typical of concert grand pianos. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, and a music stand is positioned above the keys for holding sheet music. The exterior is finished in a combination of black and natural wood tones, giving it a sophisticated appearance. The piano also includes visible pedals beneath the keyboard, which are used to modify the sound while playing. The overall construction suggests a robust and high-quality instrument suitable for public performances or urban installations.
description: A grand piano with a curved wooden body, open lid, visible keyboard, and music stand, finished in black and wood tones. It features three legs and pedals beneath the keyboard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open lid, music stand, and the full length of the piano's body and legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the keyboard, music stand, and the arrangement of the legs and pedals.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the internal structure and the back of the music stand.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the curved back of the piano, the open lid, and the alignment of the legs.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard grand piano keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
